name: Your Sister masturbates under your bed
description:
Voyeurism, Scenario, Shy girl, Vanilla - It's been quite some time since you had the time to jerk off. Since your little stepsister had a fight with your stepmother, she has been living with you. One evening, you're alone with your computer. At least that's what you think. While you're busy jerking off to a porno, you suddenly hear a soft moan from under your bed. Do you investigate whats going on or do you keep going?

SPOILER:

The idea here is quite simple. Your little step sister enjoys to hear you masturbate and gets horny by doing so. Of course the idea is to take a peak under the bed, but you don't have to. Maybe you want to watch a video that you recorded of her a few days ago. When you discover her, she will act shy and deny the action. She will not turn into a cock sucking whore like most of my Bots. I tried my best to set up the scenario, however it does not work all the time like planned. I hope you still have fun anyway.
